tasks: refactor: import named ProjectsClient instead of default
refactor: use optional chaining to simplify null checks
refactor: fix syntax error
refactor: replace useless template literals with string literals
refactor: use shorthand property syntax for object literals
Add comments to clarify component exports in EventLayout and ThemeContext for improved maintainability

Enhance step status handling in EventLayout component and improve icon and label class management. Refactor getStepStatus, getStepIconClass, and getStepLabelClass for better clarity and maintainability.

Refactor filtering logic in DashboardClient, optimize useEffect hooks in ActivityLogTab, ProjectReportTab, and CompanyUsersTab, and improve code structure in various components. Update clipboard utility for better readability and maintainability. Enhance file upload handling in ApprovalController and UploadContentController. Streamline vendor search functionality in SapVendorService and VendorEventsService. Ensure consistent error handling and improve code clarity across multiple files.
Refactor default parameter assignments for improved consistency and clarity across multiple components
Refactor debug logging in authentication and document services for improved clarity and consistency
Add comments to clarify key usage in static components for improved maintainability
Refactor StatusBadge component for improved clarity and structure. Move the component definition to the appropriate location and simplify the rendering logic.
Refactor key assignment in various components for improved uniqueness and clarity. Update keys in lists to use more descriptive identifiers instead of array indices.
Refactor proxy function for improved clarity and consistency. Replace double negation with Boolean conversion and enhance variable naming for better readability.
Refactor various components for improved readability and consistency. Update string escaping and remove unnecessary console logs.
Refactor NodeCard component for improved clarity and consistency. Remove unused borderColor variable and simplify isResult prop usage.
Refactor OTPForm and ApprovalFlowGraph2 components for improved structure and readability. Remove autoFocus from OTP input and encapsulate NodeCard logic for better maintainability.
Refactor TrackRequestPage and SubmitResponseClient for improved readability and performance. Update router variable naming and simplify option key assignment in select elements.
Refactor type definitions in useEventContent and HistoryPage for improved type safety. Update savedTemplates and change handling to use Record<string, unknown> for better clarity and maintainability.

Refactor ApproverAddModal components for improved structure and readability. Introduce UserAvatar, UserInfo, UserCheckbox, and UserItem components to reduce complexity and enhance maintainability. Update image handling with Next.js Image component for better performance.

Refactor ApproverAddModal for improved readability and maintainability. Introduce ModalHeader, ModalBody, and ModalFooter components to reduce nesting and complexity. Enhance user selection logic and search functionality with hooks for better performance.
Refactor API response types to use Record<string, unknown> for improved type safety

Refactor error message extraction logic in verification process for improved clarity and maintainability. Introduce utility functions for direct and error object message extraction. Optimize verification API request handling by encapsulating logic in a dedicated function.

Refactor error message extraction functions for clarity and consistency. Introduce a new utility function to handle error object messages and update existing logic to improve maintainability. Adjust form field markup for better readability and consistency in the verify page.

Refactor login and verification components to improve error handling and session management. Consolidate error message extraction logic and enhance session population with user data. Update form handling for better maintainability and readability.

Refactor login and verification components to improve code organization and readability. Introduce utility functions for user ID and access token extraction, and enhance error handling in response validation. Update form handling and UI components for better user experience and maintainability.

Refactor login and verification components to enhance error handling and payload management. Introduce utility functions for building request payloads, validating response content types, and extracting error messages. Improve readability and maintainability by separating concerns in the verification process.

Refactor login route and verify page components to enhance type safety and consistency. Update payload extraction logic to handle backend response structure and replace `any` types with `Record<string, unknown>`. Change function declaration style for VerifyPage for improved readability.
Refactor login route and verify page components to use arrow function syntax for consistency. Update payload handling to improve type safety by replacing `any` with `Record<string, unknown>`.

Refactor type definitions across the application to use Record<string, unknown> instead of any for improved type safety. This includes updates in various components, services, and API calls to ensure consistent type handling and reduce potential runtime errors. Key changes include:
Refactor hasProperty type guard; remove duplicate definition and update documentation for clarity.
Refactor buildProjectPayload and utility functions; extract logic for assigning master data and parent project IDs to improve readability and maintainability.
Add type definitions for CreateProjectForm and common API responses; replace `any` types with proper TypeScript interfaces for improved type safety and maintainability.

Refactor project filtering logic in ParentProjectDropdown for improved readability; extract toLowerSafe function for safer string handling. Remove unused import in ProjectNameDropdown. Simplify role retrieval logic in user-utils for clarity.

Refactor CreateProjectForm and related components; extract dropdowns into separate files for improved modularity and readability. Enhance form validation and payload building logic with dedicated helper functions.
Refactor CreateProjectForm input fields to readOnly; enhance accessibility and prevent unintended modifications.
Refactor user role management; extract role retrieval logic into dedicated utility functions for improved modularity and maintainability.
Refactor API response handling in TeamClient and CreateProjectForm; enhance type safety and clarity by specifying response types and improving error handling utilities.
Refactor project name concatenation in duplicate logic for improved readability.
Refactor date comparison logic to static method; enhance clarity and ensure consistent usage across the class.
Refactor numeric and date comparison methods to static; enhance clarity and consistency in type handling.
Refactor project comparison logic for improved clarity and modularity; extract date, array, and numeric checks into dedicated methods.
Refactor inviteVendors method to enhance modularity and clarity; extract vendor invitation processing and duplicate handling into dedicated methods.
Refactor inviteVendors and vendor resolution logic for improved clarity and modularity; streamline invitation checks and separate vendor type handling into dedicated methods.
Refactor inviteVendors method for improved clarity and modularity; extract vendor resolution and invitation handling logic into separate methods.
Refactor removeByEventAndVendor method to simplify parameters; remove companyId from method signature and adjust related logic for improved clarity.
Refactor various components to improve type safety and error handling; replace 'any' types with specific interfaces and enhance error messages for better clarity.
Refactor parseUserData in useSupplierProfile hook for improved clarity; enhance company name extraction logic.

Refactor fetchEventDataForSubmit and useSupplierProfile for improved readability and modularity; change function declarations to arrow functions, enhance user data extraction logic, and streamline error handling.

Refactor event data fetching functions for improved readability and modularity; move fetch logic into fetchEventDataForSubmit and enhance parseUserData in useSupplierProfile hook for better data handling.

Refactor API utility functions to improve code clarity and maintainability; introduce parseUserData function for better user data handling; streamline fetchSupplierProfileFromAPI and add ESLint comments for unused variables.

Refactor event data fetching utilities for improved error handling and readability; streamline fetchEventDetails and fetchEventDataForSubmit functions; enhance useSupplierProfile hook with better profile fetching logic.

Refactor event details and submission pages for improved modularity; implement fetchEventDetails and fetchEventDataForSubmit utilities; create SupplierHeader and HeroBanner components; utilize useSupplierProfile hook for profile management.

Refactor event details and submission pages for improved readability and modularity; introduce ErrorCard, EventHeader, RejectionStatus, and ActionFooter components; add utility functions for HTML stripping and date formatting.
Refactor various components and services to improve type safety and clarity; replace 'any' with specific types and enhance data handling across the application
Refactor VendorEventsService methods to improve consistency in parameter default values; streamline code readability and maintainability
Refactor various services and DTOs for improved type safety and clarity; enhance error handling and modularity in exception filters and controllers
Add SecretaryPendingItem interface for enhanced approval data structure; refactor getApprovalHistory method for improved clarity

Enhance CompaniesService and ApprovalService with improved type safety and modularity; add UpdateQueryOptions interface, refactor repository access methods, and update ApprovalHistoryItem structure for better clarity and maintainability
Refactor ProjectHeader, BudgetRow, and DateRow components for improved modularity; streamline project data rendering in ApprovalDataTable for better clarity and maintainability

Refactor PublicApprovalContent for improved structure and readability; add LoadingState, ErrorState, ProjectHeader, ProjectInfoCards, ApprovalDataTable, and ActionButtons components for better modularity and maintainability
Refactor PublicApprovalContent for improved clarity and maintainability; streamline fetchProjectDetails logic, enhance error handling, and update approvalData mapping for better type safety
Refactor VendorSetupClient and PublicApprovalContent for improved type safety; replace 'any' with specific types and streamline imports for better clarity and maintainability
Refactor error handling to use 'unknown' type for caught errors
Refactor Rule entity for improved type safety; update pausedAt and remainingTimeOnPause properties to allow null values for better clarity in data handling
Refactor Companies and Approval services for improved type safety; replace 'any' with specific types, enhance clarity in function signatures, and streamline data handling
Refactor ProjectsService to improve query consistency; replace template literals with single quotes in delete queries and streamline project retrieval logic
Refactor ProjectsService for improved type safety; update generateProjectCode method to use Repository, enhance type definitions for team member promises, and improve date comparison logic
Refactor various services and controllers for improved type safety; replace 'any' with specific types and enhance clarity in function signatures and variable declarations
Refactor surrogate and projects controllers and services for improved type safety; replace 'any' with specific types, and introduce new DTOs for team member management
Refactor logging entities to improve type safety; replace 'any' with 'unknown' in details and requestBody fields, and add user relation handling in ActivityLogService
Refactor DTOs and services for improved type safety and clarity; update various functions to use specific types instead of 'any'
Refactor vendor DTOs and service methods for improved type safety and clarity
Refactor controllers to use typed request interfaces and add DTOs for improved type safety and clarity
Refactor error handling in user and vendor retrieval functions for improved clarity and performance
Add clarification note in documentation for session handling example
update
Refactor async functions to remove unnecessary async keywords for improved performance
Refactor event handlers to use block syntax for improved readability
Add rel="noopener noreferrer" to external links for security improvements
Add exclude patterns for secrets analyzer in DeepSource configuration
Update DeepSource configuration to exclude markdown files and docs from analysis
Refactor login route to modularize backend call and session initialization
Add deployment workflow for Beatrix E-Bidding using GitHub Actions
Update DeepSource configuration and clean up login route logging
